S.FORM: Pierre Nkurunziza I 1963 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pierre Nkurunziza, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Burundi anini i ci Pierre Nkurunziza, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~u~uro~u~un…¨~…ģi anini i ¶i pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Pierre Nkurunziza I 1963 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pierre Nkurunziza, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Burundi anini i ci Pierre Nkurunziza, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~u~uro~u~un…¨~…ģi anini i ¶i pi…ôrr…ô nko~u~uro~u~un*i*a, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
